top_20_failures.failure: JSON->Postgres migration mis-maps IDs or drops fields, leaving hidden split-brain.
top_20_failures.detection: Dry-run migration with row counts, sampled field-by-field diff, and id mapping table; compare DL-XXXX vs DEAL-YYYY coverage.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Deterministic id_map table, read-only freeze during cutover, rollback script restoring JSON/SQLite writes.

top_20_failures.failure: Legacy writers continue after cutover (deal_registry.json or SQLite actions still mutated), so UI and agent drift.
applies_to: Claude Phase 1 Tasks 1.1-1.7 and Phase 6 Tasks 6.1-6.6
top_20_failures.detection: File write audit + rg/CI guard + runtime log alerts on legacy writes.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Make legacy files read-only, remove write codepaths, add CI guardrails to block reintroduction.

top_20_failures.failure: Quarantine approve is non-atomic; approved items have no deal or create duplicates.
top_20_failures.detection: DB query for approved quarantine_items with null deal_id or multiple deals per item.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Single transaction + idempotency key on process endpoint; outbox for folder creation with retries.

top_20_failures.failure: Folder scaffolding fails or path drifts on rename; DB shows deal but DataRoom missing.
top_20_failures.detection: Periodic reconciliation (deal rows with missing/invalid folder_path).
top_20_failures.mitigation: Stable folder slug/UUID stored in DB, rename handler, retry queue.

top_20_failures.failure: Stage taxonomy mismatch persists across UI/agent/backend, causing invalid transitions and UI filtering.
top_20_failures.detection: Contract test comparing API stage enum to UI schema + DB check for invalid stages.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Single source-of-truth enum from backend, versioned in OpenAPI.

top_20_failures.failure: API contract drift continues (endpoint paths/payloads differ), causing 404/422 and silent drops.
top_20_failures.detection: CI contract tests + runtime 404/422 rate monitoring.
top_20_failures.mitigation: OpenAPI as source of truth, generated clients, compatibility aliases with deprecation window.

top_20_failures.failure: Auth model fragmented (API key + JWT + proxy injection) yields missing user attribution and mystery failures.
top_20_failures.detection: deal_events rows with null actor; auth error spikes without clear trace.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Decide unified auth now, require user_id on all writes, token rotation + clear error codes.

top_20_failures.failure: Dashboard token injection becomes a single point of failure or leakage.
top_20_failures.detection: Secrets scan + alerting on long-lived tokens; audit for requests missing service token.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Short-lived service JWTs, rotation runbook, least-privilege scopes.

top_20_failures.failure: Correlation IDs not propagated through email ingestion or async jobs; tracing ends at API boundary.
top_20_failures.detection: Logs for ingestion/actions missing correlation_id.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Enforce correlation_id in job payloads; generate at ingress and persist in DB.

top_20_failures.failure: Email ingestion idempotency is incomplete, causing duplicate quarantine items and duplicate deals.
top_20_failures.detection: Duplicate quarantine_items by message_id + mailbox; daily duplicate report.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Idempotency table keyed on (message_id, mailbox, account) with body-hash fallback.

top_20_failures.failure: Deal matching false positives/negatives in ingestion cause mis-association and privacy risk.
top_20_failures.detection: Sampling audit of matched deals; false match rate.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Conservative matching with confidence threshold; require manual confirmation when ambiguous.

top_20_failures.failure: Attachment handling unsafe or incomplete (size/type/path traversal/virus).
top_20_failures.detection: Ingest logs for attachment failures; security scan results.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Enforce size/type limits, sanitize filenames, checksum + virus scan before attach.

top_20_failures.failure: RAG indexing becomes stale or inconsistent with DB.
top_20_failures.detection: Compare deal.updated_at vs rag_last_indexed_at; RAG query misses known content.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Indexing metadata table + retry queue; periodic reconciliation job.

top_20_failures.failure: HITL approvals remain split across agent DB and backend events; audit cannot link actions to deals.
top_20_failures.detection: Join query across approvals and deal_events yields null correlation.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Mirror approvals to backend with correlation_id and deal_id; enforce on approve path.

top_20_failures.failure: Approval expiry job races with manual approval; expired approvals still execute.
top_20_failures.detection: Approvals executed after expiry timestamp; audit logs.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Optimistic locking and TTL check at execution time.

top_20_failures.failure: Actions engine migration is partial; /actions/capabilities or /metrics stays 501 or inconsistent.
top_20_failures.detection: API endpoint checks + action count mismatch between legacy and Postgres.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Dual-write with reconciliation, cutover flag, migration dry-run.

top_20_failures.failure: SSE/real-time updates add instability or auth gaps; UI becomes noisy or insecure.
top_20_failures.detection: Connection count/memory metrics; unauthorized stream access.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Auth + rate limit on SSE, feature flag, fallback to polling.

top_20_failures.failure: Scheduling/reminders framework remains underspecified and misses deadlines or duplicates.
top_20_failures.detection: Reminder logs vs expected schedule; drift report.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Persist schedules in DB, idempotent job runner with retries.

top_20_failures.failure: Legacy decommission deletes files before runtime dependencies removed; production errors.
top_20_failures.detection: Runtime errors referencing missing legacy modules; canary failures.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Staged deprecation with compatibility shims + monitoring window, then delete.

top_20_failures.failure: Execution realism gap: tasks lack exact file paths/commands, leading to guesswork and regressions.
top_20_failures.detection: PR churn, conflicting fixes, repeated rework.
top_20_failures.mitigation: Add per-task implementation playbooks with file paths, commands, expected outputs.

critical_architecture_decisions.decision: Canonical deal identity and folder mapping
critical_architecture_decisions.recommendation: Adopt stable internal deal_uuid plus display deal_id (DL-XXXX) and store DataRoom folder_path in Postgres; map legacy DEAL-YYYY IDs into an alias table.
critical_architecture_decisions.why: Prevents ID collisions and enables rename-safe folder linkage; required for single-truth end-state.
critical_architecture_decisions.verification_proof: Migration produces one row per legacy deal with alias mapping; API returns both identifiers; folder_path exists for every deal.

critical_architecture_decisions.recommendation: Freeze legacy writers, run backfill + validation, then cutover with CI guards; avoid long-term dual-write.
critical_architecture_decisions.why: Dual-write increases inconsistency risk and complexity.
critical_architecture_decisions.verification_proof: Post-cutover file audit shows zero writes to JSON/SQLite; DB counts match migration report.

critical_architecture_decisions.recommendation: OIDC/JWT for users, short-lived service JWTs for internal calls, mandatory user_id on all write operations; API key only for local dev with explicit flag.
critical_architecture_decisions.why: Best-in-class auth and fewer mystery failures.
critical_architecture_decisions.verification_proof: Unauthenticated writes return 401/403; deal_events.actor always populated; token rotation test passes.

critical_architecture_decisions.decision: Email ingestion matching and idempotency contract
critical_architecture_decisions.recommendation: Define matching policy with confidence scoring + manual review; dedupe on (message_id, mailbox, account) with body-hash fallback; store match_reason.
critical_architecture_decisions.verification_proof: Duplicate ingestion updates existing quarantine item; QA sampling shows low false match rate.

critical_architecture_decisions.recommendation: Mirror approvals into backend DB with correlation_id and deal_id; treat backend as audit source of truth.
critical_architecture_decisions.why: Unified audit trail and replay safety.
critical_architecture_decisions.verification_proof: Join query across approvals and deal_events returns matching correlation_id for last N approvals.

critical_architecture_decisions.recommendation: Index only canonical deal artifacts, store last_indexed_at and content hashes, reindex on deal update with retry queue; define fail-closed behavior.
critical_architecture_decisions.why: Ensures deal-as-knowledge stays consistent with DB.
critical_architecture_decisions.verification_proof: Updated deal content appears in RAG within SLA; reconciliation job shows zero stale items.

plan_patch_set.title: Migration Cutover Playbook
plan_patch_set.details: Add read-only window, id_map table, row-count + field diff validation, rollback script, and CI guard to block legacy writes.

plan_patch_set.title: Contract Versioning + Contract Tests
plan_patch_set.details: OpenAPI as source of truth, generated clients, compatibility aliases, schema-drift CI checks.

plan_patch_set.title: Auth Baseline Earlier + Token Hardening
plan_patch_set.apply_to: Claude Decision 2.7 + Phase 5; Gemini D4 + Phase 3; Codex Phase 0
plan_patch_set.details: Require user_id for writes, short-lived service JWTs, rotation runbook, explicit 401/403 behavior.

plan_patch_set.title: Observability for Async + Ingestion
plan_patch_set.apply_to: Claude Phase 3/4; Gemini Phase 0; Codex Phase 0/4
plan_patch_set.details: Enforce correlation_id on ingestion jobs and action executors; define log schema and trace linking across services.

plan_patch_set.title: Email Ingestion Safety Spec
plan_patch_set.apply_to: Claude Phase 4; Gemini D3/Phase 0; Codex Phase 4
plan_patch_set.details: Add idempotency keys, match_confidence, attachment scanning, and privacy-safe storage rules.

plan_patch_set.title: HITL Audit Unification
plan_patch_set.apply_to: Claude Phase 3; Gemini Phase 4; Codex Decision set
plan_patch_set.details: Mirror approvals to backend with correlation_id and enforce idempotent approval processing.

plan_patch_set.title: RAG Consistency + Reconciliation
plan_patch_set.details: Add last_indexed_at + content_hash fields, reindex retry queue, and health gate for stale index rate.

plan_patch_set.title: Execution Playbooks per Phase
plan_patch_set.details: Add a one-page runbook per phase with exact files, commands, expected outputs, and rollback steps.

requirements: Lint/typecheck outputs for backend, agent, dashboard
rg/CI guard output showing no legacy references
Key endpoints return expected status codes
DB counts match UI list counts
evidence_artifacts: DB query results showing deal count
Log snippet with correlation_id spanning services

requirements: Email ingestion -> quarantine -> approve -> deal -> folder -> RAG -> agent
evidence_artifacts: Deal DB row + DataRoom folder listing
RAG query output for ingested content
rg/find outputs showing no legacy files
